input.type: foundational type name, semantic alias, array type, dictionary, or opaque

input.role: semantic role name from the foundational data types role catalog

output.description: normalized role description with aliases and underlying types

input.value: canonical tagged value converted by the adapter into the target-native value model before inspection

output.payloadKind: scalar, dimensioned, matrix, quaternion, semanticAlias, array, dictionary, opaque, or valueBlock
output.storageType: underlying storage/read type used for agreement checks
output.scalarDomain: boolean, signedInteger, unsignedInteger, floating, text, token, or omitted when not scalar-like
output.numericPrecision: u8, i32, u32, i64, u64, f16, f32, f64, or omitted for non-numeric values
output.elementType: element type for dimensioned, matrix, quaternion, and array payloads
output.shape: dimensioned, matrix, or quaternion shape when applicable
output.semanticRole: semantic role when inspecting a semantic alias or alias array
output.underlyingType: underlying type for semantic aliases and alias arrays
output.arrayElementType: element type when inspecting an array payload
output.arrayElementKind: element payload kind when inspecting an array payload

input.value: canonical tagged value converted by the adapter into the target-native value model before reading

output.type: requested type when the checked read succeeds
output.value: adapter serialization of the requested typed payload, or a TypeMismatch diagnostic when the requested type does not agree with the stored type

input.stronger: dictionary object whose leaves are canonical tagged values
input.weaker: dictionary object whose leaves are canonical tagged values

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with an ops array.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results. This uses the same adapter shape as handle tests but does not require persistent handles.
